rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It correctly identified that two changes were needed: (1) patching the ray-head Service to expose port 8265, and (2) patching the Deployment to change --include-dashboard=false to --include-dashboard=true --dashboard-host=0.0.0.0 so the dashboard process binds to all interfaces rather than loopback. The curl test returned HTTP 200, the oracle verified pass with 'service/ray-head exposes port 8265' and 'dashboard endpoint returned HTTP 200', and all 6 regression sweep stages passed with no regressions introduced.
